label: Code (JavaScript)
description: Run user-supplied JavaScript inside a V8 isolate sandbox. Returns the evaluated value to downstream nodes.

settings.name: code
settings.label: Code
settings.description: JavaScript expression / statements with the upstream output bound as `input`. The last expression's value (or an explicit `return`) is the node output.

settings.name: language
settings.label: Language
settings.description: Currently only `javascript` is supported in-process. Use the openagentic node for python.

settings.name: timeoutMs
settings.label: Timeout (ms)
settings.description: Max wall time for sandboxed execution before forced termination.

settings.name: expectsOutput
settings.label: Expects output?
settings.description: When true, the node fails if the code returns undefined (catches typos like a missing `return`).

ai.shortDescription: Run a JavaScript snippet against the upstream input.
ai.whenToUse: When the workflow needs a small in-process transformation that doesn't fit the transform node's map/filter/reduce/extract verbs.
ai.examplePrompt: add a code step that returns input.users.filter(u => u.active).length
ai.promptHints: The variable `input` holds the upstream output. Use `return X;` to set the node output. Heavy work (HTTP, file I/O) does NOT belong here — use http_request or k8s_sandbox_run.

outputAssertions.name: code_did_not_error
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Code node returned an `error` field — execution failed inside the sandbox.
